business.name: Tbconcrete
business.tagline: Solid concrete work for the Crescent City

hero.headline: *Three generations* trust us with their concrete
hero.subheadline: Driveways, slabs, sidewalks — built to last through New Orleans weather.

services.title: Driveways
services.description: New concrete driveways built to handle New Orleans traffic and weather. Proper base prep and finishing.

services.title: Slabs & Foundations
services.description: Level, reinforced concrete slabs for patios, garages, and building foundations. Done right the first time.

services.title: Sidewalks & Walkways
services.description: Safe, smooth walkways that complement your property. ADA compliant options available.

services.title: Concrete Repair
services.description: Fix cracks, settling, and damage. We'll assess what can be repaired versus what needs replacement.

about.heading: Built for New Orleans
about.body: We're a New Orleans concrete team that shows up when we say we will. One call, one crew, one job done right.

reviews.name: Eerika C.
reviews.text: Professional, went above and beyond on a tight timeline. Honest about material shortages. Three generations of our family has used them.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater New Orleans
service_areas.subheading: Quality concrete work throughout the metro area

cta.heading: Ready to pour?
cta.body: Get an honest estimate on your concrete project. We'll walk the site and give you straight answers.
